notes: Applies matching Prompts automatically and in full while keeping Skills and MCP servers explicitly on demand.
Persists unread completion state and configurable Recent Agent history across application restarts.
Keeps clipboard group order, fixes deletion of the final item, and refreshes dialogs and resource transfer controls.
Adds signed one-click updates through Sparkle 2 on macOS and Velopack on Windows.
Publishes separate Apple Silicon and Intel macOS packages; Intel macOS and Windows packages remain beta.
